description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana with a gently curved, single-edged steel blade and a black lacquered wooden scabbard. The blade is long and slender, featuring a sharp edge and a slightly rounded tip, typical of katana swords. The handle is wrapped in black cord with visible white diamond-shaped patterns, providing both grip and aesthetic appeal. A circular, gold-colored guard (tsuba) separates the blade from the handle, adding a decorative and functional element. The scabbard is glossy black and tied with a deep red cord, which is neatly knotted. The overall craftsmanship and materials suggest a weapon designed for both display and practical use.
description: A traditional Japanese katana with a curved steel blade, black cord-wrapped handle, gold guard, and a glossy black scabbard tied with a red cord.
description_view_0: The katana is seen from the tip, showing the circular gold guard and the alignment of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the curved blade, black handle with white accents, gold guard, and the glossy black scabbard with a red cord.
description_view_2: The katana is viewed from the back edge, highlighting the thickness of the blade and the circular guard.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the blade, handle, and scabbard with the red cord.
attribute_handle_design: straight, black cord-wrapped handle with white diamond patterns and a rounded pommel
attribute_ornamentation: gold-colored circular guard, white diamond handle pattern, red cord on scabbard
